text: 'Nakwhl hlidaa 'wihl wili'y g̲oohl wag̲ayt andoosda wil jok̲hl amxsiwaa.
translation: A long time ago, I lived overseas where the white people lived.

text: Ii na 'wahl anhahla'lst g̲oohl Stockholm sawatdiit.
translation: And I found work in Stockholm, that's what they call it.

text: Ii hahla'lsdi'y g̲oohl IBM.
translation: And I worked for IBM.

text: Ii hlaa k'i'yhl k'uuhl ii na sdilhl ansiip'insxwi'y g̲anhl nakst g̲oohl wag̲ayt Spain 'wayi'm.
translation: After one year, my friend and her husband and I traveled all the way to Spain.

text: Ii hlaa guxws luu yaltxu'm ii basax̲xu'm g̲oohl Denmark.
translation: And on the way back we separated in Denmark.

text: Ii na yuxwhl train ii yee'y g̲oohl Stockholm.
translation: And I took the train and I went to Stockholm.

text: Ii hlaa bagu'm g̲oohl Stockholm ii ha'wi'y.
translation: And we arrived in Stockholm and I went home.

text: Ii 'nakwhl 'wihl wili'm, gwila'lhl g̲anuutxw, g̲an wihl needii lax̲'nisxwi'y g̲oohl Gigeenix.
translation: And we were away a long time, three weeks, and that's why I didn't hear from Gigeenix.

text: Ii yee'y g̲oohl anhahla'lsdi'y.
translation: And I went to my work.

text: Ap yukwhl ha'niisgwaa'ytxw.
translation: But it was Sunday.

text: Ii neediit naa dim 'witxwit.
translation: And no one would be there.

text: Ii yee'y loot nii dok̲hl mail'y.
translation: And I went there and I got my mail.

text: Ii hlag̲ook̲ dim ha'wi'y ii ky'aa isxwi'y g̲oohl wilp xseek̲.
translation: And before I went home I had a short pee in the bathroom.

text: Ii daayimaahl wili'y g̲an wina sg̲at'akwhl aats'ip.
translation: And I don't know why I locked the door.

text: Ii hlaa yukwhl dim xsawi'y ii needii 'nim k̲'ak̲hl aats'ip.
translation: And I was going to go out but the door didn't want to open.

text: Ii xsi hlguxwsxwi'y, ii lip ligi agwihl bag̲a'y, ii ap neet.
translation: And I couldn't get out, and whatever I tried I couldn't get out.

text: Ii k̲'aa 'nii giihli'y lax̲ ha'niiwan.
translation: And I laid on the floor for a while.

text: Ak̲hl ligi 'wihl he'y.
translation: I didn't know what to think. || I had no thoughts at all.

text: Ii 'nii yatshl pipe-- nii gya'a wil sgihl pipe aloohl ha'niiyo'oxsxw.
translation: And I hit the pipe-- I saw there was a pipe on the sink.

text: Nii xhlii guut iin yatshl pole loot, upja ligi 'wihl wihl ligit naa.
translation: And I took it apart, and I hit the pole with the pipe in case anybody was around.

text: Ii neediit naa ji 'witxwit.
translation: But no one came.

text: Agwiyukwhl ha'niisgwaa'ytxwhl g̲an wihl neediit naa ji hahla'ljit.
translation: Because it was Sunday, no one was at work.

text: Ii hehl t'ilx̲ootxwi'y, "Dim aam dim wili'y, yukwhl bax̲hl aks."
translation: And my thoughts said, "I will be alright because there is running water."

text: "Ii ak̲hl ligi 'wihl baasxi'y g̲oosun."
translation: "And there is nothing for me to fear here."

text: Ii giihli'y, ii si'ix wok̲si'y.
translation: And I laid down, and tried to sleep.

text: Ii ap neet, g̲an wina guuhl hlgu pipe gi nii yatshl aats'ip loot.
translation: But no, that's why I took the little pipe and I hit the door with it.

text: Ii hlaa amhl g̲a'nagwit iin gya'ahl g̲adaaxhl wilp xseek̲.
translation: And after a while I was able to see the outside of the bathroom.

text: Nii japhl 'wii luu no'o dim xsi yuwi'y, ii 'nithl wili'y.
translation: I made a big hole to go through, and that's what I did.

text: Hlaa xsa'ak̲xwi'y 'nii g̲ayoo ts'imil t'aahlihl jabi'y g̲oohl ts'im wilp xseek̲.
translation: When I made it out, then I put what I had done (the rubble) back in the bathroom.

text: Hlaa yukwhl hahla'lsdi'm ii ha'niig̲oodi'y wihl ii'uxwt g̲anwilat 'nii yuxwdiithl office'y.
translation: We went back to work and I wondered why the men kept coming into my office.

text: Ii hediit, "Oo, 'nit Canadanska flika tun ant kw'asinhl wilp xseek̲."
translation: And they said, "Oh, this is the Canadanska flika [Canadian girl] who broke the toilet."
